awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome resources related to the Ada and SPARK programming language
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of awesome resources related to the Ada and SPARK programming language

nodes.itemHTML: • aurastars15 - An integrated build and source/package management tool with a more hands-on versioning approach. Alternative to alire and gprbuild. Optimized for CI/CD pipelines.

• asapstars2 - A set of general libraries and thick bindings for use with the AURA package management/build tool. Includes TCP, TLS, HTTP, a high-performance JSON parser/generator, and a formally verified (SPARK) UTF-8 stream decoder.
• geo-energy-mathstars4 - Software libraries for solving models described in Mathematical GeoEnergy (Wiley, 2018)
• ironclad - A kernel for x86_64 devices striving for POSIX compatibility, used on several distributions like Gloirestars19.
• celebrating-ada - Ada history key moments.
• linenoise-ada - Bindings to the Linenoise line-editing library (patched to support UTF-8)
• uri-ada - URI and MIME parser & manipulation library.
• tlsada - Bindings to the libtls TLS/SSL library.
• getopt-ada - Portable implementation of getopt(3) in Ada.
• ada-planet - News Aggregator from the Ada programming language world. (RSS feed via Matrix)
• matrix-ada - Ada room at Gitter via Matrix.
• programming-with-ada - Anecdotes and summaries from learning Ada 2012.
• gitter-ada - Ada channel at Gitter.
• libera-chat-ada - Ada channel at IRC.
• chestsstars3 - Chests are bounded containers.
• whitakers-wordsstars209 - William Whitaker's WORDS, a Latin dictionary.
• ada-chess - Chess engine written in Ada.
• cmake-ada-cho3stars0 - CMake language support for Ada, fork of plplot's cross-platform support code.
• civ-klonstars10 - Civilization-style turn-based strategy game. Requires asfmlstars19.
• qt-ada - Ada-2012 port to Qt 6 framework.
• ada-guistars20 - GUI implemented on its own task, so it doesn't require that its client give up a thread of control. Derived from gnoga.
• plplot - Cross-platform, scientific graphics plotting library, including an Ada binding.
• max-home-automation - gtkadastars73 application to manage ELV/eQ-3 MAX! cubes for home automation.
• dasherastars29 - Data General DASHER terminal emulator using gtkadastars73.
• yotrocstars4 - Assembler/Emulator for a fictional CPU architecture. IDE implemented in gtkadastars73.
• canta - A tool to help to sing in tune.
• ob-ada-sparkstars7 - Ada/SPARK support for org-babel : Evaluate source code blocks with Gnu Emacs and org files.
• ewsstars9 - Embedded Web Server is a web server construction kit, designed for embedded applications using the GNAT Ada compiler.
• ada-runtimestars31 - A downsized Ada runtime which can be adapted to different platforms.
• pasta - Pasta! is a game of the "match-3" genre, implemented in gnoga.
• buttonsstars2 - A simple gtkadastars73 Button Mania game.
• play-2048stars2 - Play 2048! is a clone of the popular 2048 game, implemented in Ada using asfmlstars19 for graphics and ada-tomlstars24 for saving state.
• bingadastars4 - Bingo application in gtkadastars73

• gneissstars22 - Gneiss is an interface collection to be used with applications for component based systems. It aims to be easily portable/platform independent and is compatible with the ada-runtimestars31
• gnoga - The GNU Omnificent GUI for Ada.
• gtkadastars73 - Ada graphical toolkit based on Gtk3 components.
• matreshka - Matreshka is an Ada framework to develop information systems. It consists of five major components: League, XML processor, Web framework, SQL access, and the Modeling framework.
• zip-ada - Zip-Ada is a programming library for dealing with the Zip compressed archive file format.
• dcf-ada - An Ada 2012 library for document container files (Based on zip-ada).
• protobuf-adastars9 - Experimental Ada code generation support for Google Protocol Buffers.
• protobufstars16 - A Google Protocol Buffers implementation in Ada, using matreshka.
• ada-tomlstars24 - TOML parser for Ada.
• template-parserstars4 - AWS templates engine.
• asfmlstars19 - Ada binding to the Simple and Fast Multimedia Library.
• ssprepstars0 - An extensible template engine akin to jinja but using template-parserstars4 and intended for command line usage.
• hunterstars21 - Graphical (gtkadastars73) file manager for Linux.
• eagle-landerstars26 - Apollo 11 lunar lander simulator (gtkadastars73/Cairo).
• a2js - Ada2JS is experimental open source compiler, component of matreshka.
• tp7-ada-gtkadastars3 - Implementation of Turbo Pascal 7.0 units with gtkadastars73.
• tp7-ada-gnogastars4 - Implementation of Turbo Pascal 7.0 units with gnoga.
• cudastars10 - CUDA support from AdaCore.
• tomi-4-ada - Wrappers for various client/server and pub/sub messaging protocols (AMQP, STOMP and ZeroMQ), focusing exclusively on text message communications.
• mosquitto-adastars4 - Binding for the MQTT broker Mosquitto.
• tashy - Tashy is short from Tcl Ada SHell Younger. It is derivate of Tash, focused mostly on Tk binding.
• tashy2 - Tashy2 is short from Tcl Ada SHell Younger. It is derivate of Tashy, and aims to be more idiomatic and uses a more permisive license.
• ada-luastars36 - Ada binding for Lua.
• coreland-lua-adastars5 - Ada bindings to the Lua language.

• leastars14 - LEA, a Lightweight Editor for Ada, aims to provide an easy, script-world-like, "look & feel" for developing Ada projects of any size and level, while enabling access to full-scale development tools like GNAT. LEA includes HAC, the HAC Ada Compiler.
• hacstars71 - HAC Ada Compiler - a small, quick Ada compiler fully in Ada.
• blake2sstars1 - SPARK83 implementation of the BLAKE2s hash function.
• septumstars346 - An interactive context-based text search tool for searching large codebases.
• ada-actionsstars18 - Ada Toolchains for GitHub Actions
• cmake-ada-offastars11 - Ada language support for CMake.
• macos-sdks-vs-gccstars1 - Provides GCC 'specs' files to cope with SDK policy changes.
• ux-stringsstars6 - Unicode extended strings.
• umbrello - Unified Modelling Language (UML) diagram program based on KDE Technology. Outputs Ada.
• aicwl - Collection of packages provided for design of high-quality industrial control widgets for Ada applications.
• ada-for-automation - A4A is a framework for designing industrial automation applications using the Ada language.
• lacestars1 - A set of Ada components to allow 3D simulations, games and GUI's in Ada.
• si - SI units checked and unchecked.
• a-shellstars12 - A component to aid in writing shell-like applications in Ada.
• az3stars5 - Ada binding for Z3
• radalibstars9 - Ada library and tools for the analysis of Complex Networks and more.
• fltk-ada - Ada-2012 port to FLTK.
• smart-pointersstars1 - A package providing a reference-counted access type Smart_Pointer.
• ada-95-tutorial - A book going from beginner to advanced concepts in Ada 95, complete with source files.
• ada-at-rosetta-code - A collection of programming tasks and their sample solutions in Ada.
• vim-ada-bundlestars6 - Maintained Ada Bundle : Complete Ada-Mode for Vim/NeoVim.
• adawebpackstars34 - GNAT RTL for WASM and bindings for Web API.
• threefishstars5 - Ada Implementation of the Threefish-256 Encryption Algorithm.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • libadalangstars122 - Libadalang is a library for parsing and semantic analysis of Ada code. It is meant as a building block for integration into other tools (IDE, static analyzers, etc).
• adaglstars7 - Multiplatform Ada/OpenGL bindings (ported to native/OpenGL, A2JS/WebGL and WASM/WebGL).
• ada-vscodestars1 - Basic syntax highlighting for Ada and GPR.
• ncurses-ada95 - Ada95 bindings for ncurses.
• record-fluxstars86 - RecordFlux: Toolset for the formal specification of messages and the generation of verifiable binary parsers and message generators in SPARK.
• ada-crypto-librarystars84 - This is a crypto library for Ada with a nice API and is written for the i386 and x86_64 hardware architecture.
• spark-naclstars81 - SPARK 2014 re-implementation of the TweetNaCl crypto library.
• xml-ez - Library for emitting XML from Ada programs.
• axmppstars7 - With the AXMPP library you can connect to a Jabber server to send and receive messages.
• zanyblue - An Ada package allowing the externalization of application messages into a properties file.
• a-stream-toolsstars1 - Stream utilities for Ada2005 and 2012.
• em-brickstars0 - emBRICK driver and support for emBRICK in Ada.
• micro-tem-pistars2 - Raspberry Pi using a BBC Micro:Bit as temperature sensor.
• covid-19-simulatorstars11 - Multi engine/algorithms COVID-19 simulator. Ada, Qt code under the hood.

• ada-magic - SofCheck AdaMagic is ACATS validated and certified Ada compiler targeting C and/or C++ (4 command line switches for fine tuning). ObjectAda and several other commercial compilers share engine with AdaMagic. MapuSoft distributes AdaMagic as integral component of AppCOE.
• cursesstars11 - Advanced UNIX Terminal UI Ada Binding Package.
• engine-3dstars2 - A 3D engine for DOS-talgics.
• apq-base - APQ is a database interface library written in Ada95.
• lalgstars1 - Interface to dense linear algebra packages.
• libsodium-adastars7 - A secure cryptographic library (libsodium for Ada).
• ada-libsecretstars1 - Ada Binding for the libsecret library.
• ada-lzmastars4 - Ada binding for liblzma compression library.
• adasocketsstars12 - IPv4 socket library (TCP, UDP, and multicast).
• dbus-ada - The D_Bus/Ada library provides an Ada binding to the D-Bus message bus system.
• zeromq-adastars35 - Binding to the ZeroMQ comunications-library.
• weechat-adastars3 - Ada 2012 library for WeeChat plug-ins.
• weechat-canberrastars1 - A WeeChat plug-in written in Ada 2012 that plays sounds using Canberra.
• weechat-emojistars1 - A WeeChat plug-in written in Ada 2012 that displays emoji.
• orkastars47 - The OpenGL 4.6 Rendering Kernel in Ada 2012.
• sdladastars89 - Ada 2012 bindings to SDL 2.
• ada-nanovgstars1 - Ada bindings to NanoVG.
• free-type-adastars1 - FreeType binding for Ada 2005.
• cuda-ada - CUDA/Ada is an Ada binding to NVIDIA’s CUDA parallel computing platform and programming model.
• opencl-adastars15 - An Ada binding for the OpenCL host API.
• opus-adastars2 - Ada 2012 bindings for the Opus audio codec.
• canberra-adastars4 - Ada 2012 bindings for libcanberra, an implementation of the XDG Sound Theme and Name Specifications.
• ada-soundiostars5 - Ada bindings for libsoundio.
• otostars3 - Ada binding to OpenAL which tries to mimic original API while using Ada types.
• rcladastars6 - Ada client library for ROS2/RCL.
• player-adastars4 - Ada bindings for the player robotic platform.
• florist - POSIX Ada binding, IEEE Standards 1003.5(b,c).
• wposixstars4 - Ada Windows POSIX binding.
• ada-v4l2stars0 - Ada Posix Binding to Video 4 Linux, used for RPI.
• inotify-adastars8 - An Ada 2012 library for monitoring filesystem events using Linux' inotify API.
• dl-adastars1 - Minimal binding to libdl.
• win32adastars16 - Ada API to the Windows library.
• ada-net-framework-core - Ada bindings for the Microsft NetFramework Api.
• ada-net-frameworkstars5 - Ada bindings to the Microsoft NetFramework Api.
• ada-winrtstars8 - Ada bindings for the Microsft WinRT Api.
• ada-win32stars4 - Ada bindings for the Microsoft Win32 Api.
• ada4cmakestars3 - CMake macros for simple gnat project inclusion.

• simple-components - ASN.1, MQTT client and server/broker implementation, B-trees, Multiple connection TCP servers, Chebyshev series, Mutexes, Cryptography, Objects and handles to, Doubly-linked webs and lists, ODBC bindings, Blackboards (lock-free), OpenSSL bindings, ELV/eQ-3 MAX! client implementation, Parsers, Events (plain, pulse, array of), Persistent objects and handles to, GNUTLS bindings, Persistent storage and handles to, Graphs (directed, weighted, acyclic, trees), Pools, HTTP implementation, Sets and maps, FIFO (lock-free), SMTP client implementation, IEEE 754, SQLite bindings, Inter-process communication, Stacks, Interfacing Julia language, Streams, JSON, Strings editing, LDAP, Tables (maps of strings), MODBUS client implementation, Unbounded arrays.
• compiler-explorer - Run GNAT FSF compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly.
• m2os - RTOS with simple tasking support for small microcontrollers.
• cubitstars69 - CuBitOS is a multi-processor, 64-bit, (partially) formally-verified, general-purpose operating system, currently for the x86-64 architecture.
• ada-portable-sound - a linux-sound-playing package for Ada apps that can asynchronously start and stop music loops, as well as initiate transient sounds. Suitable for games.
• adacore-ada - Language Support for Ada. It includes Language Server for Adastars159.
• ada-utilitiesstars0 - VSCode extension Ada programmers which provides a few utility functions.
• ada-lspstars11 - Language Server Protocol for Ada.
• ada-lsp-clientstars1 - Prototype implementation of LSP client - Visual Studio 2017.
• fletcherstars0 - Trivial implementation of fletcher_16 checksum computation algorithm.
• base58-adastars4 - Base58 encoding and decoding in Ada.
• libsparkcrypto - A cryptographic library implemented in SPARK.
• sip-hashstars1 - A pure Ada implementation of the SipHash PRF.
• libkeccakstars26 - A SPARK implementation of the Keccak family of sponge functions and related constructions.
• ascon-sparkstars1 - Ada/SPARK implementation of the Ascon Authenticated Encryption with Additional Data Algorithm.
• spark-sip-hashstars5 - Ada/SPARK implementation of the SipHash keyed hash function.
• spark-norxstars8 - Ada/SPARK implementation of the NORX Authenticated Encryption with Additional Data Algorithm.
• stotpstars7 - Timed One-Time-Pad (RFC 6238) implementation in SPARK.
• xxhash-adastars1 - Extremely fast non-cryptographic Hash algorithm, xxhash is working at speeds close to RAM limits.
• hungarianstars1 - Ada wrapper for the fast Stachniss' Hungarian solver.
• ghdlstars1.7k - VHDL 2008/93/87 simulator.
• ada-keystorestars28 - Ada Keystore - protect your sensitive data with secure storage.
• ada-language-serverstars159 - Adacore server implemention of the the Microsoft Language Protocol for Ada and SPARK.
• ada-cpp-java - Ada for the C++ or Java Developer.
• ada-crash-course - Ada 2012 crash course under 50 pages from Vermont Technical College.
• tcl-ada-shellstars5 - Tcl Ada SHell (Tash) is an Ada binding to Tcl/Tk.
• ada-mlstars8 - Ada-tailored UML Modeling Language.
• gnat-pro - The GNAT Pro product line offers a comprehensive toolset (IDEs, debugger, librairies, dynamic and static analysis tools) for Ada, C and C++.
• janus-ada - Compiler supporting all the major features of the Ada 83, Ada 95, Ada 2005 and Ada 2012 versions of the language.
• object-ada - PTC ObjectAda is an extensive family of native and cross development tools and runtime environments.
• apex-ada - PTC ApexAda is one of the industry’s most popular development environments for Ada and mixed Ada/C/C++ applications.
• greenhills-ada - Green Hills Software offers the industry's first, fully validated family of Ada Cross Compilers for real-time targets.
• xgc - XGC provide GCC-based bare-metal toolchains with Ada95 support for aerospace-specific targets such as MIL1750, ERC32 and LEON. As well as a legacy M68000 toolchain.

• gnat-ce - GNAT Community edition. A release of AdaCore GNAT for free software developers, hobbyists, and students. The run-time libraries provided with GNAT Community are licensed under GPLv3 without linking exception. It supports Ada 2012 only.
• havkstars21 - x86-64 security-focused OS being created with SPARK.

• fsf-gnat - Free Software Foundation compiler for the Ada programming language which forms part of the GNU Compiler Collection. It supports all versions of the language, i.e. Ada 2012, Ada 2005, Ada 95 and Ada 83.
• cortex-gnat-rtsstars47 - This package includes GNAT Ada Run Time Systems (RTSs) based on FreeRTOS and targeted at boards with Cortex-M0, M3, -M4, -M4F MCUs.
• acatsstars7 - The Ada Conformity Assessment Test Suite, customised for GCC.
• acats-gradingstars1 - Tools for grading ACATS results, modified for Unix-like systems.
• coldframestars6 - ColdFrame generates Ada framework code and documentation from UML models.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • xiastars3 - An Ada implementation of XPath 1.0.

• multiplexed-iostars0 - This contains explorations, for AdaPilot, of implementing drivers for the AdaRacer MCU, using the Ravenscar profile of Ada 2012 from AdaCore and device bindings generated using SVD2Ada.
• cappuladastars14 - Ada binding generator for C++.
• asis2xmlstars2 - Converts Ada sources’ ASIS representation to XML, so as to make it easier to develop reporting and transformational tools using (for example) XSLT.
• analytical-enginestars9 - An Ada 2012 emulation of Charles Babbage’s Analytical Engine.
• dhondtstars4 - Ada implementation of D’Hondt electoral result calculator.
• gwindowsstars14 - GNU Ada Visual Interface.
• globe-3dstars13 - GL Object Based Engine for 3D.
• mathpaqsstars7 - Mathpaqs is a collection of mathematical, 100% portable, packages in the Ada programming language.
• ini-filesstars5 - The Ini file manager consists of a package, Config, which can read and modify informations from various configuration files known as "ini" files.
• excel-writerstars4 - Create Excel files with basic formats.
• generic-image-decoderstars14 - Multi-format image decoder library for Ada.
• ada-pdf-writerstars12 - Ada package for producing easily and automatically PDF files, from an Ada program, with text, vector graphics, images (JPEG).
• ada-bar-codesstars10 - Ada Bar Codes provides a package for generating various types of bar codes (1D, or 2D like QR codes) on different output formats, such as PDF or SVG.
• azip - A free, portable Zip Archive Manager.
• texcadstars3 - TeXCAD is a program for drawing or retouching {picture}s in LaTeX.
• cbsgstars4 - The Corporate Bullshit Generator.
• wasabeestars7 - A Web browser with safety focus.
• pascal-to-adastars9 - A Pascal to Ada translator.
• mandelbrot-asciistars2 - Mandelbrot renderer in "ASCII" (unicode actually, but text nonetheless).
• ada-kalinda-os - Ada_KALINDA is a sort of Mac Plus like OS written in Ada95.
• cxosstars34 - Ada Operating System development example.
• lovelace-os - Lovelace is an effort to write a Unix like operating system using the Ada 2012 language.

• scala - Scala is a powerful software tool for experimentation with musical tunings, such as just intonation scales, equal and historical temperaments, microtonal and macrotonal scales, and non-Western scales.
• subreddit-ada - Ada at Reddit.
• subreddit-spark - Spark at Reddit.
• telegram-ada - Ada group at Telegram.
• bbedit-ada-module - BBEdit support for Ada.
• yassstars17 - Yet Another Static Site Generator (like Jekyll or Hugo).
• mine-detectorstars1 - Mine Detector: a mine-finding game that never requires guessing.
• adalibstars15 - Standard Ada library specification as defined in Reference Manual.
• ada-basestars29 - Thick database bindings to MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite for Ada.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • parser-toolsstars6 - Tools for writing lexers / parsers in Ada.
• ada-synth-libstars30 - Simple audio synthesis library.
• cvsweb2gitstars0 - Tool to imports CVS repository shared on Ada Conformity Assessment Authority into the Git repository.
• ada-bundlerstars5 - Library and tool for transparently handling data and configuration file access in an Ada application. Supports MacOSX, Linux and Windows.
• ajunitgenstars1 - Generator of JUnit-compatible XML reports in Ada.
• adagiostars3 - Gnutella2 (G2) network server leaf.
• agplstars4 - Ada General Purpose Library (Miscellaneous utilities, with a robotic flavor).
• rxadastars7 - An Ada 2012 implementation of the Rx methodology.
• licensingstars0 - Open Source Licenses library for Ada.
• simple-logging - Easy to use logging facilities for output to console in Ada programs.
• rsfilestars0 - Command-line utility that picks a file from a folder hierarchy with probability proportional to its size.
• cstringsstars0 - Convenience subprograms to interact with C strings.
• sanctastars1 - SANCTA multi-robot task allocation library.
• ada-visual - Ada language integration for Visual Studio 2017.

• alirestars185 - A catalog of ready-to-use Ada libraries plus a command-line tool (alr) to obtain, compile, and incorporate them into your own projects. It aims to fulfill a similar role to Rust's cargo or OCaml's opam.
• boehmgc-adastars5 - Ada binding to the Boehm-Demers-Weiser conservative garbage collector.
• simple-blockchainstars19 - Simple blockchain in Ada.
• sparforte - SPARforte programming language is an Ada-like scripting language, previously known as business user shell (bush). Can be used as interactive UNIX shell replacement.
• gshstars88 - GSH is non interactive POSIX shell for Windows, aimed at GNU software builds. 2-3 times faster than Cygwin.
• gnatcoll-scripts-shell - GNATCOLL.Scripts.Shell is a simple embeddable scripting language, part of GNATCOLL Core.

• para-sail - ParaSail is a highly parallel experimental language, similar to Go and Erlang. Originaly owned by SofCheck (now AdaCore), it is a test project to try new ideas. Expandable pointers is a sample feature that is about to be introduced to SPARK and Ada. There are in fact 4 experimental languages: ParaSail, Sparkel, Javallel, Parython, all sharing bytecode interpreter and LLVM engine.
• charles - Charles is an Ada 95 container library, precursor to Ada 2005+ standard containers.
• sensortile - This project shows how to initialize a SensorTile and how to send sensor data over BLE from a SensorTile to a suitable host.
• dequesterity - Deque/buffer generics that consist of building blocks that may be combined in various ways to create higher abstraction buffers.
• paraffin - A suite of Ada 2012 generics to facilitate iterative and recursive parallelism for multicore systems.
• deepend - Deepend is a storage pool with subpool capabilities for Ada 2012, Ada 2005, and Ada 95.
• ada-wikibook - Ada Programming book at Wikibooks.
• ada-distilled - Ada Distilled for Ada 2005.
• ada-craft - Ada 95: The Craft of Object-Oriented Programming.
• spark-guidance - Implementation Guidance for the Adoption of SPARK.
• ada-safe-secure - Safe and Secure Software. An invitation to Ada 2012.
• ada-bfdstars7 - Ada BFD is an Ada binding for the GNU Binutils BFD library. It allows to read binary ELF, COFF files by using the GNU BFD.

• swagger-adastars17 - Ada support for Swagger codegen: OpenAPI Generator is a code generator that supports generation of API client libraries, server stubs and documentation automatically given an OpenAPI Spec.
• etherscopestars17 - Ethernet traffic monitor on a STM32F746 board.

• ada-utilstars56 - A logging framework close to Java log4j framework, support for properties, serialization/deserialization framework for XML/JSON/CSV, Ada beans framework, encoding/decoding framework (Base16, Base64, SHA, HMAC-SHA), a composing stream framework (raw, files, buffers, pipes, sockets), several concurrency tools (reference counters, counters, pools, fifos, arrays), process creation and pipes, support for loading shared libraries (on Windows or Unix), HTTP client library on top of CURL or AWS.

• ada-adostars21 - Ada Database Objects is an Ada05 library that provides object relational mapping to access a database in Ada05. The library supports Postgresql, MySQL, SQLite as databases. Most of the concepts developped for ADO come from the Java Hibernate ORM.
• automatestars2 - Finite-state machine generator.
• j2adastars2 - Translator for a Java valid source code in Ada source code.
• ada-compositionstars7 - A collections of small nifty demos/sample code that may help better layout data or structure project.
• adacore-blog - An insight into the AdaCore ecosystem.
• vtk-ada - Ada-2012 port to VTK 8.1 (Visualization Toolkit).

nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • aforthstars17 - Embeddable Forth interpreter written in Ada.
• ada-doom-3stars232 - Id Software's Id-tech-4-BFG in the Ada programming language.
• ada-3dsstars4 - A simple 3DS Max model renderer.
• areadlinestars7 - Ada interface to the readline library.
• abf-iostars0 - A library of access routines to Axon's ABF file format (electrophysiology, most common) in Ada.
• fuzzyml - Fuzzy machine learning framework.
• ada-promisesstars6 - Implementing promises in Ada. Type-safe, efficient, thread-safe.
• claw - CLAW, a High Level, Portable, Ada 95 Binding for Microsoft Windows.
• ada-fuzzystars3 - A fuzzy inference system library for Ada.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • wisitoken - WisiToken is an LALR, LR1, and Packrat parser generator and run-time.
• reqrep-task-poolsstars1 - Task pool system for jobs.
• learn - Interactive learning platform designed to teach the Ada and SPARK programming languages.
• adacore-video-tutorials - AdaCore University Video Tutorials.
• simple-games - Learning Ada 2012 by writing simple games.
• spark-by-examplestars132 - Collection of verified functions and data types in SPARK.
• gems - Ada Gem Archive.
• ada-ic-learning - For additional learning resources, see the AdaIC learning section.
• iso-standard - The 2012 revision to the Ada Standard, usually known as Ada 2012.
• comp-lang-ada - Ada Usenet newsgroup/forum.
• stack-overflow-ada-tag - Ada at Stack Overflow.
• ada-europe - Ada-Europe is an international organization, set up to promote the use of Ada.
• acm-sig-ada - The Special Interest Group on Ada.
• ada-resource-association - Since 1990 the Ada Resource Association’s principal mission has been “To ensure continued success of Ada users and promote Ada use in the software industry”.
• ada-information-clearinghouse - News and resources for the Ada programming language.
• byronstars51 - The Byron project is a community-driven Ada compiler, toolchain, and IDE-system.
• tutorials-point-ada-compiler - Online compiler built on the CodingGround engine.
• gnu-emacs-ada-mode - Gnu Emacs major-mode for editing Ada sources.
• ada-tmbundlestars6 - TextMate support for Ada.
• gprbuildstars49 - Adacore multi-language software build tool.
• ravenadmstars18 - Administration tool for Ravenports http://www.ravenports.com.
• synthstars235 - Next D/Ports build tool for live systems (Alternative for Portmaster and Portupgrade tools).
• continuous-verificationstars9 - SPARK formal verification automated with Travis CI.
• bb-runtimesstars48 - GNAT bare metal board support package (BSP).
• avr-ada - GNAT for 8-bit AVR microcontrollers.
• muen - An x86/64 Separation Kernel for High Assurance.
• ewokstars69 - EwoK is a microkernel targeting micro-controllers and embedded systems.
• steamsky - Roguelike in sky with a steampunk setting.
• unity-ada-tetris - Tetris, in Ada, for the Unity game engine.
• tictactoestars2 - A tictactoe game written and proven in SPARK/Ada.
• ada-gatestars16 - AdaGate is a first-person 3D sokoban puzzle game within a Stargate / Portal fantasy setting for Windows, OS-X and Linux.
• rufas-cubestars3 - RufasCube is a puzzle game for Windows, OS-X and GNU Linux... it looks like a rubic cube but it's a slider, not a twister.
• ada-venturestars8 - AdaVenture is a kid-friendly retro point&click game with mazes, dragons, bats & snakes.
• mini-pacman - MiniPac is a kid friendly ascii character version of Pacman that plays in a commandline terminal.
• world-cup-sokerbanstars2 - This is a soccer-themed, 3D sokoban puzzle game that runs on Windows, Mac OS-X and GNU Linux.
• gnatcoll-corestars36 - This is the core module of the GNAT Components Collection.
• gnatcoll-bindingsstars10 - This is the bindings module of the GNAT Components Collection.
• gnatcoll-dbstars11 - This is the DB module of the GNAT Components Collection.
• poly-orbstars19 - PolyORB provides a uniform solution to build distributed applications relying either on middleware standards.
• ada-oglstars3 - Ada OpenGL Framework.
• ahven - Ahven is a simple unit test library and framework for the Ada programming.
• alog - Alog is a stackable logging framework for Ada.
• gnat-coveragestars27 - GNATcoverage is a tool to analyze and report program coverage.
• adacontrol - Ada constructs lint tool.
• spark-2014stars161 - SPARK formal verification toolset.
• asn1sccstars225 - ASN1SCC: An open source ASN.1 generator to Ada type declarations and encoders/decoders.
• ocarinastars49 - AADL model processor: mappings to Ada code; Petri Nets; scheduling tools (MAST, Cheddar); WCET; REAL.
• fmt - Formal Methods Toolkit is a set of extension packages for Mathematica, supporting software. engineering activities related to modeling, verification and Ada code generation.
• math-packagesstars20 - Collection of basic math routines in Ada.
• ada-traits-containersstars23 - Generic Ada Library for Algorithms and Containers.
• pragmarcstars21 - PragmAda Reusable Components (PragmARCs) from PragmAda S/W Engineering.
• ada-idstars15 - Simple Ada library for generating UUIDs.
• ada-gastars2 - Genetic Algorithm Implementation for Ada.
• ada-sodokustars5 - Small Library for Sodoku grid solving / finding.
• sl3pstars1 - Simple Layer 3 Protocol.
• hungarian-algorithmstars1 - Hungarian Algorithm implementation in Ada.
• sal - SAL (Stephe's Ada Library).
• nb-adastars10 - NBAda : An Ada library of lock-free data structures and algorithms.

nodes.itemHTML: • parse-argsstars9 - Simple command-line argument parsing.
• ada-yamlstars29 - Experimental YAML 1.3 implementation in Ada.
• json-adastars28 - An Ada 2012 library for parsing JSON.
• jwxstars15 - A formally verified JSON library in SPARK.
• xmladastars20 - The XML/Ada toolkit.
• spark-xmlstars19 - A formally verified XML library in SPARK.
• ada-midistars4 - Implementation of Midi / MidiFile reading and writing.
• ada-bin2ascstars0 - Various binary-to-ASCII codecs such as Base64.
• adhcp - ADHCP is an implementation of the DHCP protocol in Ada.
• opengl-adastars81 - Thick Ada binding for OpenGL and GLFW.
• ada-synthetizerstars13 - Sound Synthetizer Library implemented in Ada.
• auto-countersstars7 - Reference counting approaches to resource management.
• robotics-with-adastars15 - Robotics with Ada, ARM, and Lego.
• certifliestars25 - Source code for the full Ada + SPARK Crazyflie 2.0 firmware.
• ada-drivers-librarystars196 - Ada drivers for various MCU and sensors.
• dw1000stars10 - Ada/SPARK driver for the DecaWave DW1000 ultra-wideband (UWB) radio chip.
• evb1000stars0 - Ada/SPARK drivers to control the on-board peripherals of the DecaWave EVB1000 evaluation board.
• solenoid-engine-controllerstars3 - Software controller for solenoid engines (Ada/STM32F4).
• gizastars6 - Giza is trying to be a simple widget tool kit for embedded platforms.
• ada-synth-libstars30 - Simple audio synthesis library.
• gestestars15 - GESTE is a sprite and tile 2D render engine designed to run on micro-controllers.
• coffee-clockstars6 - Waking up with a fresh cup of coffee.
• noise-nuggetstars11 - Square Inch Synthesizer.
• spark-railway-demostars6 - Simulated railway network in SPARK/Ada.
• wee-noise-makerstars21 - Wee Noise Maker is an open source pocket synthesizer.
• lunar-lander-rotationstars1 - Program that interacts with the AdaFruit BNO055 breakout board in order to send orientation data to a host computer.
• ada-timestars17 - Ada binding for the Pebble Time smartwatch.
• wiring-pi-adastars0 - Ada bindings for wiringPi.
• trash-finder - Trash Finder is a mail filter that operates as a plugin for your mail server, providing filtering on dozens of criteria along with management of known good mail.
• ironsides - Authoritative DNS server verified by SPARK/Ada.
• acncstars60 - A G-code parser and CNC controller (in Ada).
• parallel-simstars1 - Distributed Simulation of Transport Networks.
• adabrowse - HTML generator for Ada95 library unit specs.
• tiled-code-genstars1 - Code generator for Tiled the map editor.
• cvsweb2gitstars0 - This tool imports CVS repository shared on Ada Conformity Assessment Authority into the Git repository.
• gnatcoll-jsonstars4 - This is a set of helpers for writing JSON-intefaces it contains JSON parses for most of the Ada runtime components.
• pcsc-ada - PCSC/Ada provides a thick Ada binding to PC/SC-middleware. The library allows programs written in Ada to communicate with smart cards using the SCard API.
• co-terminal-appsstars23 - Retro Games that run in a terminal on any platform.
• bare-bonesstars74 - An Ada port of the osdev.org minimal 32-bit x86 kernel.
• jdoodle-ada-compiler - Online compiler that provides multiple versions of GNAT to test with.

• marte-os - MaRTE OS is a Hard Real-Time Operating System for embedded applications that follows the Minimal Real-Time POSIX.13 subset. It provides an easy to use and controlled environment to develop Multi-Thread Real-Time applications.
• railway-simulationstars4 - Program simulating a railway network with trains, switches and signaling. The signaling system is proven with SPARK/Ada to ensure that trains cannot collide.
• svd2adastars50 - An Ada binding generator from SVD descriptions for bare board ARM devices.
• awsstars108 - AWS is a complete framework to develop Web based applications in Ada.

• awastars76 - Ada Web Application is a framework to build a Web Application in Ada 2012. The framework provides several ready to use and extendable modules that are common to many web application. This includes the login, authentication, users, permissions, managing comments, tags, votes, documents, images.
    • dynamostars13 - Code generator used to generate an Ada Web Application or database mappings from hibernate-like XML description, YAML doctrine model or UML models.
    • ada-wikistars18 - Ada Wiki is a small library that provides a Wiki engine.
    • ada-securitystars17 - OAuth 2.0 client and server framework to secure web applications.
    • ada-elstars6 - This library provides the support for a simple Expression Language close to the Java Unified Expression Language (EL).
    • ada-asfstars11 - Ada Server Faces allows to create web applications using the same pattern as the Java Server Faces (See JSR 252, JSR 314 and JSR 344).
    • ada-servletstars6 - Ada Servlet allows to create web applications using the same pattern as the Java Servlet (See JSR 154, JSR 315).
• anet - Anet is a networking library for the Ada programming language.
• booch95 - The Ada 95 Booch components are a port of Grady Booch's C++ components.
